borrowerOperationsAddresses.description: Addresses allowed to mint and burn BOLD. One BorrowerOperations is whitelisted per collateral branch via setBranchAddresses.

activePoolAddresses.description: Addresses allowed to mint BOLD (aggregate interest minting). One ActivePool is whitelisted per collateral branch via setBranchAddresses.

troveManagerAddresses.description: Addresses allowed to burn BOLD. One TroveManager is whitelisted per collateral branch via setBranchAddresses.

stabilityPoolAddresses.description: Addresses allowed to burn BOLD and move it in and out of the Stability Pool. One StabilityPool is whitelisted per collateral branch via setBranchAddresses.

values.name: Liquity V2 - Wrapped liquid staked Ether 2.0
